concept: Helper / One Who Offers an Open Mind
description: One who offers assistance freely when need arises. A helper contributes to a task or effort with an open and willing mind.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'no' (mind) and 'a' (openness). The word's structure literally means 'an open mind.' This defines a helper by their willing and open mental state, ready to contribute their thought and energy to a task. It is phonetically identical to 'talk', creating a poetic link: to talk is often to help.
